This column documents whether the transmission route of patient's current reconciled medication list to subsequent provider was paper based. 0 = No
1 = Yes
^ = Blank
448 ROUTE_PRVDR_OTHR_CD ROUTE_PRVDR_OTHR_CD Provider Trans - Other Methods CHAR 1 This column documents whether the transmission route of patient's current reconciled medication list to subsequent provider was an alternate method such as text, email or CD. 0 = No
1 = Yes
^ = Blank
449 CRNT_MDCTN_LST_RSDNT_CD CRNT_MDCTN_LST_RSDNT_CD
